title: Fixture note on feature fusion
content: Feature fusion comparisons should hold the data split, seed, optimization budget, and evaluation metric constant; complexity should be reported alongside performance.

title: Fixture note on ablation scope
content: An ablation on synthetic data supports only a scoped comparison under the tested configuration and does not establish generalization to real datasets.

title: Fixture note on representation capacity
content: Concatenation followed by projection introduces additional trainable parameters compared with elementwise addition when branch widths are equal.
